name: Prasad Kavuri
description: Executive AI Engineering leader with 20+ years experience operating 13 production AI systems. Available for VP/Head of AI Engineering roles.
experience_summary: Applied AI engineering executive with 20+ years building production-grade AI platforms at enterprise scale. Specialises in agentic orchestration, LLM FinOps, and responsible AI governance. Led AI infrastructure serving 13,000+ B2B customers at Krutrim/Ola; scaled global AI platforms at HERE Technologies across APAC, EMEA, Americas. Primary differentiator: bridges AI research and enterprise reliability.

leadership_scope.organizational_impact: Cross-functional AI platform ownership across product, infra, and data spanning US, Europe, and India

key_differentiators: Production-first mindset: every system ships with observability and guardrails
FinOps discipline: 70% cost reduction through intelligent LLM routing
Governance expertise: HITL, drift monitoring, and accountability frameworks
Scale experience: enterprise AI across APAC, EMEA, Americas
13 live production AI demos demonstrating real engineering, not slides

experience_summary.leadership_scope: Enterprise AI platform strategy, global engineering leadership, and operational governance.
career_highlights: Ex-Krutrim: built and scaled enterprise-grade Agentic AI platform capabilities
Ex-Ola: delivered platform transformation for Ola Maps and large-scale enterprise adoption
Ex-HERE: led global mobility and mapping engineering programs for automotive ecosystems

companies: Ex-Krutrim (Agentic AI Leader) — Architected India's first Agentic AI platform (Kruti.ai); Head of AI Engineering
Ex-Ola (13K B2B Customers) — Led Ola Maps platform serving 13,000+ enterprise customers across logistics, automotive, and mobility verticals
Ex-HERE Technologies (18-year tenure) — Director of Engineering for Highly Automated Driving; HD maps for global OEM autonomous platforms

impact_metrics.cost_reduction: 70% infrastructure cost reduction delivered at Ola via FinOps-aware LLM routing and inference optimisation
impact_metrics.latency_improvement: 50% p99 latency reduction at Krutrim through quantisation, speculative decoding, and multi-model routing
impact_metrics.enterprise_scale: 13,000+ B2B customers enabled at Ola Maps through platform API strategy and developer tooling
impact_metrics.team_scale: 200+ engineers led across Krutrim, Ola, and HERE Technologies spanning US, Europe, and India

agent_capabilities: Design and scale governed multi-model AI platforms
Lead retrieval architecture and RAG quality programs
Drive model routing, latency optimization, and cost control
Build enterprise-safe AI governance and observability controls
Translate executive objectives into measurable AI product outcomes

reasoning.philosophy: Prioritises FinOps, Agentic Orchestration, and responsible AI governance. Designs systems that degrade gracefully, audit themselves, and surface cost signals to non-technical stakeholders.
reasoning.approach: Production-first: every demo ships with observability, guardrails, and a clear ROI narrative. Treats AI reliability as a risk management problem, not just an engineering one.
reasoning.leadership_style: Cross-functional — bridges ML engineering and executive communication. Translates 'latency p99' into 'customer impact' and 'token cost' into 'budget forecast'.

highlights: 50% latency reduction at Krutrim via quantisation + speculative decoding
70% cost savings demonstrated via FinOps-aware LLM routing patterns
Built evaluation framework catching hallucination regressions pre-production
Deployed multi-agent orchestration with HITL checkpoints and full trace propagation
